headline: the silent agent tax
sub: an agent rereads 3 versions of a doc to guess which is live, and pays for the 2 it throws away. ~60% off doc lookups once one store answers.

headline: stale context looks like a confident wrong answer
sub: your agent cites a doc you deleted months ago. the index just never noticed it died.

headline: a faster autocomplete isn't the jump
sub: the payoff: agents running real units of work in prod. a different operating model, not a license.

headline: ai readiness is six things, not a seat count
sub: most teams are strong on one or two, thin on the rest.
